title: senecillis stenocephala
intro: Senecillis stenocephala, also known as Groundsel Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Groundsel Tree include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Groundsel Tree can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
